features.name: Service Worker & PWA Enhancement
features.description: Offline support, installable PWA, cache strategies, push notifications

aiContext.implementationStrategy: Native Service Worker API with no dependencies. Cache-first for static assets (CSS/JS/images), network-first for HTML pages. Build pipeline generates version-stamped SW and injects registration into all pages.
aiContext.testingStrategy: Manual PWA audit via Chrome DevTools Lighthouse. SW lifecycle verified via Application panel. Offline mode test via DevTools Network throttling.

features.name: Interactive Product Demo Mockups
features.description: Animated product mockups showing OptiFlow OS interface in action

aiContext.implementationStrategy: Tabbed interactive demo on product-overview hero dashboard with 4 panels (Dashboard, Tasks, Attendance, Reports). Clickable KPIs cycle through metric variants. Chart bars show tooltips on hover. Status chips toggle pending/done/overdue. Pure CSS+JS, no frameworks.
aiContext.testingStrategy: Manual interaction testing: tab switching, KPI cycling, chip toggling, chart tooltips, dark mode compatibility.

features.name: Site Search Functionality
features.description: Client-side site search with result highlighting, keyboard navigation (Ctrl+K), and build-time search index
acceptanceCriteria: Search toggle button visible in navigation bar
Search ranks results by title/description/content match
Arrow key navigation and Enter to follow link
search-index.json generated at build time (7.5 KB, 14 pages)
No new dependencies, no backend required

aiContext.implementationStrategy: Client-side search with build-time JSON index. Deviates from original spec (which called for API-005 backend + autocomplete/filters) because 14-page static site doesn't justify KV-powered search.
aiContext.testingStrategy: Manual verification: build passes, validate 0 errors, search-index.json generated, search UI present on all 14 public pages, Ctrl+K shortcut functional, dark mode adapts via CSS variables.

repository.name: OptiFlow OS Website
repository.purpose: Marketing website for OptiFlow OS — Business Execution Operating System for Indian MSMEs. Replace WhatsApp chaos and Excel silos with one structured platform.
repository.techStack: Static HTML/CSS/JS, Node.js build pipeline, Cloudflare Pages + Netlify
repository.architecture: Pages-based static site (15 pages) with custom design system, autonomous orchestration engine (48 modules), and spec-driven development
repository.designSystem: Custom Enterprise DESIGN.md v5.0, CSS variables only, 8px spacing grid, Inter+JetBrains Mono typography, light/dark themes

keyDirectories.features: AI-native feature registry (this directory) — canonical source of truth
keyDirectories.tests/e2e: Playwright E2E test suite (a11y, SEO, visual regression)
keyDirectories.hooks: 7 git hooks (pre-commit, pre-push, pre-build, post-build, post-merge, theme-change, pre-orchestrate)

engineeringStandards.design: CSS variables only (var(--*)), no hardcoded hex values, 8px spacing grid, Inter+JetBrains Mono fonts, WCAG 2.2 AA contrast ratios, placeholders only for company data ({{PHONE}}, {{EMAIL}}, {{YEAR}})
engineeringStandards.code: ESM modules, no classes unless stateful, immutability preferred, ponytail principle (fewest files, shortest diff), no unnecessary abstractions, security-first (no hardcoded secrets)
engineeringStandards.testing: Playwright E2E tests, axe-core a11y audits, Lighthouse CI performance, 80%+ coverage target, visual regression tests
engineeringStandards.build: node scripts/assemble.mjs assembles src/ -> dist/, pre/post-build hooks run validation, feature integrity checked on every build
engineeringStandards.deployment: Dual-deploy to Cloudflare Pages + Netlify, wrangler.toml + netlify.toml config, manual production promotion

aiStandards.featureFirst: Always read features/features.json BEFORE making any code change — features define what exists, what is planned, and how to implement
aiStandards.designSystemCompliance: Use CSS variables from core.css, typography classes (.display, h1-h6, .lead, .body), spacing variables (var(--gap-*)), INCLUDE directives for nav/footer, placeholders for company data
aiStandards.skillDiscovery: For skill selection, prefer per-feature aiContext over capability-analyzer re-discovery — aiContext is pre-computed and validated
aiStandards.implementationStrategy: Read per-feature aiContext.implementationStrategy for implementation guidance before starting
aiStandards.traceability: Every commit message MUST reference a Feature ID (e.g., feat(SYS-001): add dark mode toggle). Every implementation MUST trace to a feature
aiStandards.autonomy: Use /opsx-auto for full autonomous lifecycle. Use individual /opsx-* commands only for debugging or manual control
